name: JellyWatchParty
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Synchronized watch parties for Jellyfin. Create or join rooms to watch content together with friends, perfectly in sync.

versions.changelog:
New Features:
- Clients such as Jellyfin Andoid TV (official) that already have the needed api infrastructure to control playback on the clients can now be selected as receiver.
- The new receiver feature and the host feature are now opt-in and need to be enabled via the plugin config page. 





## What's Changed
* jelly jellyfin android tv client as receiver  by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/41
* Fix: surface the receiver action in the in-room panel by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/42
* Harden receiver bridge: readiness, join confirmation, reachability guard by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/43
* docs: log Round 28 (receiver bridge) and document the receiver role by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/44
* Develop by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/45


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/compare/v1.5.0.0...v1.6.0.0

## What's Changed
* Add third-party client integration guide (implem.md) by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/37
* Add option to hide Jellyfin's native SyncPlay button by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/38


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/compare/v1.4.4.0...v1.5.0.0

## What's Changed
* Develop by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/28
* Allow hosts to switch audio/subtitle tracks without disrupting room sync by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/29
* Fix group play console showing wrong server URL by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/31
* Warn on invalid or unreachable Session Server URLs by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/32
* Fix short JwtSecret crashing /JellyWatchParty/Token (issue #30 root cause) by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/33
* Fix ScriptInjectionMiddleware permanently disabling itself on transie… by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/34
* Fix missing client JS files in CI/release workflows by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/35
* Sync develop into main by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/36


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/compare/v1.4.3.0...v1.4.4.0

## What's Changed
* Develop by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/24
* Add Windows prebuilt binary distribution for session server by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/25
* Develop by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/26


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/compare/v1.4.2.0...v1.4.3.0

## What's Changed
* Fix remaining skip-propagation in release publish workflow by @TIGamingTV in https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/pull/20


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TIGamingTV/JellyWatchParty/compare/v1.4.1.0...v1.4.2.0
